title: Assemble citable, license-clean EWSR1-FLI1/ETS gene signatures
context: M2 annotation inputs. Only citable, license-clean EWSR1-FLI1/ETS signatures may be used for program scoring. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Assemble a citable, license-clean set of EWSR1-FLI1/ETS gene signatures for program scoring, with redistribution checked per source.
acceptanceCriteria: Each signature traced to a citable source; redistribution of the gene list license-checked.
Non-commercial-sourced lists excluded from CC-BY output.
Signatures recorded in a machine-readable, citation-bearing format.
